topicOverview: An in-depth deep dive into C. Mastering this is critical for passing technical interviews for Embedded Systems Engineer roles.
whyItMatters: C is a core foundation of modern engineering. Interviewers use it as a proxy to test your deeper understanding of systems, performance, and best practices.
examples: Implementing C in a real-world scenario
practiceQuestions: Fix the bug in the given C snippet.
interviewQuestions: What are the pros and cons of C?
How does C handle memory management?
